criteriaResults.evidence: 3-turn scripted run with HookedLoopClient inspecting on-disk state via SessionStore.load BEFORE 2nd and 3rd chat() calls (race-free, sequenced by the loop's own await chain): turnsUsed 1/3 messages before call 2, 2/5 before call 3; final record has full metadata + Message[] INCLUDING completion turn's assistant text (which the in-loop array never receives).
Seeded file -> resumeSession -> initialMessages into fresh loop -> ScriptedLoopClient.lastParams.messages contains the 2 seeded messages ahead of the new user message; file afterward has old+new.

forkSession copies; fork continues with a response the original never received; original bytes identical before/after (readFile byte-compare); fork diverges. + 3 SessionStore.fork unit tests + deterministic fork-id test.
No-session run: .bober/sessions/ readdir rejects (never created); paired run with/without session deep-equal AgenticLoopResult. Full suite 301 files / 3832 tests green.

Missing session -> typed {error}, no throw, no file created; corrupt JSON -> typed {error}, bytes unchanged (byte-compare); store.load('ghost') stays null after failed resume (never silently empty). SessionStore.load returns null for missing/corrupt/schema-invalid.
build + typecheck exit 0, run fresh after all edits.

filesChanged.description: Zod MessageSchema (union-ordering preserves AssistantMessage.toolCalls), SessionRecordSchema, SessionStore save/load/fork/path over .bober/sessions/<id>.json mirroring job-store.ts (ensureDir, safeParse both directions, injected clock), sessionForkId deterministic derivation.
21 tests incl. the toolCalls union-ordering round-trip trap and no-directory-until-first-save.

session?/initialMessages? params; initialMessages seeded ahead of user message; fail-soft persistSession() closure called at every turn-body completion point (tool turn, completion incl. final assistant text, budget_exceeded, API error, max-turns); exported resumeSession/forkSession.
9 new tests (sprint-6 describe block) with HookedLoopClient for race-free mid-run assertions.
Barrel exports: resumeSession, forkSession, SessionStore, SessionRecord.

commits: c51b28b - bober(sprint-6): loop session persistence, resume and fork (.bober/sessions/)
notes: No pipeline-role agent files touched (all 8 stay byte-identical automatically; git diff --stat shows only the 5 estimated files; package.json unchanged). types.ts untouched — Message union already JSON-serializable. Design notes: save() re-reads existing file per call to preserve createdAt (O(1) extra read, ceiling-commented); turnsUsed = current invocation's local counter, not cumulative across resume lineage (per generatorNotes). Suite 3802->3832 (+30).
